findings.description: S3 bucket 'ecommerce-media-prod' allows public read access via bucket ACL. Contains product images and user-uploaded content.
findings.remediation: Remove public-read ACL. Enable S3 Block Public Access at account level.

findings.description: IAM role 'ecommerce-api-role' has AdministratorAccess managed policy attached. ECS tasks run with full AWS API access.
findings.remediation: Replace with least-privilege policy scoped to required S3, RDS, SQS, and CloudWatch actions only.

findings.description: RDS PostgreSQL instance 'ecommerce-prod' is publicly accessible. Database contains PCI cardholder data and PII.
findings.remediation: Disable public accessibility. Move to private subnet. Use VPC endpoints for access.

findings.description: ECS task definition contains database password and Stripe API key as plaintext environment variables.
findings.remediation: Move secrets to AWS Secrets Manager. Reference via valueFrom in task definition.

findings.description: Security group 'ecommerce-alb-sg' allows inbound traffic on all ports (0-65535) from 0.0.0.0/0.
findings.remediation: Restrict to ports 80 (HTTP) and 443 (HTTPS) only. Remove all-traffic rule.

findings.description: CloudTrail log file integrity validation is disabled. Attacker could tamper with audit logs without detection.
findings.remediation: Enable log file validation on CloudTrail trail.

findings.description: KMS customer-managed key used for RDS encryption does not have automatic key rotation enabled.
findings.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation. Rotation period: 365 days (AWS default).

findings.description: Application Load Balancer does not drop invalid HTTP headers. Allows HTTP request smuggling attacks.
findings.remediation: Enable 'Drop Invalid Header Fields' on ALB to prevent request smuggling.

findings.description: Lambda function has resource-based policy allowing invocation from any AWS account (*). Processes order payment data.
findings.remediation: Restrict resource policy to specific source ARNs (API Gateway, SQS).

findings.description: ECR repository does not have image scanning enabled. Container images may contain known vulnerabilities.
findings.remediation: Enable scan-on-push for the ECR repository. Integrate with EventBridge for automated alerting.
